hero.title: Turn off the calculator
hero.description: Adapt any recipe to a new shape in 3 seconds. No more wasted ingredients from miscalculated proportions.

problem.title: Where's that recipe?!
problem.description: Hundreds of screenshots on your phone — you waste time again searching for "that exact" cream cheese.

solution.title: Smart recipe book
solution.description: Create your own recipes, combine fillings and biscuits like a constructor. Your knowledge base always in your pocket.

problem.title: Client wants to change the shape
problem.description: Formulas, proportions, fear of making mistakes and wasting products. Why can't we just bake?

solution.title: Recalculation in 1 click
solution.description: Change the shape or weight — the system instantly gives new amounts. No errors, no wasted products.

problem.title: Am I working at a loss?
problem.description: You work, buy the best cream — and at the end of the month you don't understand where your profit is.

solution.title: Accurate cost calculation
solution.description: We account for everything: from a pinch of vanilla to the box and decor. Earn for real, not on paper.
